title: thelypteris quelpartensis
intro: Thelypteris quelpartensis, also known as Korean fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, particularly in Korea, China, and Japan. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris quelpartensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Korean medicine.
